description:
Configure a new payment method for the store to accept manual bank transfers. Create a payment gateway named 'Bank Transfer' using the Manual plugin. Set the display label to 'Bank Wire Transfer', the mode to Live, and ensure the status is Enabled. The payment instructions must be set exactly to:

Please transfer the order total to the following bank account:
Bank: First National Bank
Account Name: Urban Electronics LLC
Account Number: 7890123456
Routing Number: 021000021
Reference: Your order number

The Drupal admin credentials are 'admin' / 'Admin1234!' (already logged in).
